label: Gardening
description: An everyday gardener channel — practical, conversational, leans on sensory detail.

visuals.style_description: Warm, natural daylight photography in real backyards. Realistic, beautiful visuals that match the current narration.
visuals.creative_direction: Show the problem before the solution — dying plants, stressed leaves, container puddles — when the script names a pain point. Wide context shots for explanation, tight close-ups for action. When the script names a product or measurement, make it recognizable to a viewer at the hardware store.
